rule.description: Windows Audit: Reconnaissance activity - Suspicious file search in user directories.

full_log: <Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event"><System><Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" Guid="{5770385F-C22A-43E0-BF4C-06F5698FFBD9}" /><EventID>1</EventID><Version>5</Version><Level>4</Level><Task>1</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8000000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime="2024-03-15T10:30:00.1234567Z" /><EventRecordID>123456</EventRecordID><Correlation /><Execution ProcessID="1234" ThreadID="5678" /><Channel>Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational</Channel><Computer>WIN-SRV01</Computer><Security UserID="S-1-5-21-1234567890-123456789-1234567890-1001" /></System><EventData><Data Name="RuleName">-</Data><Data Name="UtcTime">2024-03-15 10:30:00.123Z</Data><Data Name="ProcessGuid">{12345678-90AB-CDEF-1234-567890ABCDEF}</Data><Data Name="ProcessId">9876</Data><Data Name="Image">C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe</Data><Data Name="FileVersion">10.0.19041.1 (WinBuild.160101.0800)</Data><Data Name="CommandLine">"C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe" /c "dir /s C:\Users\*\Documents\*.docx C:\Users\*\Desktop\*.xlsx C:\Users\*\Downloads\*.pdf C:\ProgramData\*\*.bak C:\Program Files\*\*.config 2>nul"</Data><Data Name="CurrentDirectory">C:\Users\user.name\</Data><Data Name="User">WIN-SRV01\user.name</Data><Data Name="LogonGuid">{FEDCBA98-7654-3210-FEDC-BA9876543210}</Data><Data Name="LogonId">0x12345678</Data><Data Name="TerminalSessionId">1</Data><Data Name="IntegrityLevel">Medium</Data><Data Name="Hashes">MD5=A1B2C3D4E5F6A7B8C9D0E1F2A3B4C5D6,SHA1=1A2B3C4D5E6F7A8B9C0D1E2F3A4B5C6D7E8F9A0B,SHA256=0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF,IMPHASH=AABBCCDD11223344556677889900AABB</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessGuid">{ABCDEF12-3456-7890-ABCD-EF1234567890}</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessId">1234</Data><Data Name="ParentImage">C:\Windows\explorer.exe</Data><Data Name="ParentCommandLine">C:\Windows\explorer.exe</Data><Data Name="ParentUser">WIN-SRV01\user.name</Data></EventData></Event>

data.command_line: "C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe" /c "dir /s C:\Users\*\Documents\*.docx C:\Users\*\Desktop\*.xlsx C:\Users\*\Downloads\*.pdf C:\ProgramData\*\*.bak C:\Program Files\*\*.config 2>nul"

rule.description: Windows - Suspicious use of archiving utility (7-Zip) for data staging.

full_log: <Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event"><System><Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" Guid="{5770385F-C22A-43E0-BF4C-06F5698FFBD9}" /><EventID>1</EventID><Version>5</Version><Level>4</Level><Task>1</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8000000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime="2023-10-27T10:45:00.000000000Z" /><EventRecordID>12345</EventRecordID><Correlation /><Execution ProcessID="1234" ThreadID="5678" /><Channel>Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational</Channel><Computer>WIN-SRV01.example.com</Computer><Security UserID="S-1-5-18" /></System><EventData><Data Name="RuleName">-</Data><Data Name="UtcTime">2023-10-27T10:45:00.000000000Z</Data><Data Name="ProcessGuid">{12345678-90AB-CDEF-1234-567890ABCDEF}</Data><Data Name="ProcessId">9876</Data><Data Name="Image">C:\Program Files\7-Zip\7z.exe</Data><Data Name="FileVersion">21.07 (x64)</Data><Data Name="Description">7-Zip Console</Data><Data Name="Product">7-Zip</Data><Data Name="Company">Igor Pavlov</Data><Data Name="OriginalFileName">7z.exe</Data><Data Name="CommandLine">"C:\Program Files\7-Zip\7z.exe" a -tzip C:\ProgramData\TempStaging\sensitive_data.zip C:\ProgramData\TempStaging\*</Data><Data Name="CurrentDirectory">C:\Program Files\7-Zip\</Data><Data Name="User">NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM</Data><Data Name="LogonGuid">{FEDCBA98-7654-3210-FEDC-BA9876543210}</Data><Data Name="LogonId">0x3e7</Data><Data Name="TerminalSessionId">0</Data><Data Name="IntegrityLevel">System</Data><Data Name="Hashes">MD5=A1B2C3D4E5F6A7B8C9D0E1F2A3B4C5D6,SHA256=1234567890ABCDEF1234567890ABCDEF1234567890ABCDEF1234567890ABCDEF</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessGuid">{ABCDEF12-3456-7890-ABCD-EF1234567890}</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessId">1234</Data><Data Name="ParentImage">C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe</Data><Data Name="ParentCommandLine">"C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe" /c "7z a -tzip C:\ProgramData\TempStaging\sensitive_data.zip C:\ProgramData\TempStaging\*"</Data></EventData></Event>

rule.description: Windows MSIEXEC.EXE program executed with suspicious arguments (silent installation of AWS CLI)

full_log: <Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event"><System><Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" Guid="{5770385F-C22A-43E0-BF4C-06F5698FFBD9}" UserID="S-1-5-18" /></System><EventData><Data Name="RuleName">-</Data><Data Name="UtcTime">2024-07-30T10:00:00.000000000Z</Data><Data Name="ProcessGuid">{12345678-90AB-CDEF-1234-567890ABCDEF}</Data><Data Name="ProcessId">9876</Data><Data Name="Image">C:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe</Data><Data Name="FileVersion">10.0.19041.1 (WinBuild.160101.0800)</Data><Data Name="Description">Windows installer</Data><Data Name="Product">Microsoft® Windows® Operating System</Data><Data Name="Company">Microsoft Corporation</Data><Data Name="OriginalFileName">msiexec.exe</Data><Data Name="CommandLine">msiexec /i C:\Windows\Temp\AWSCLIV2.msi /quiet /qn</Data><Data Name="CurrentDirectory">C:\Windows\System32\</Data><Data Name="User">NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM</Data><Data Name="LogonGuid">{FEDCBA98-7654-3210-FEDC-BA9876543210}</Data><Data Name="LogonId">0x3e7</Data><Data Name="TerminalSessionId">0</Data><Data rule.description: Suspicious command line activity detected (AWS CLI credential configuration).

full_log: <Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event"><System><Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" Guid="{5770385F-C22A-43E0-BF4C-06F5698FFBD9}" /><EventID>1</EventID><Version>5</Version><Level>4</Level><Task>1</Task><Opcode>0</Opcode><Keywords>0x8000000000000000</Keywords><TimeCreated SystemTime="2023-10-27T11:15:00.0000000Z" /><EventRecordID>123456</EventRecordID><Correlation /><Execution ProcessID="4" ThreadID="12" /><Channel>Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational</Channel><Computer>WIN-SRV01</Computer><Security UserID="S-1-5-18" /></System><EventData><Data Name="RuleName">Process Create</Data><Data Name="UtcTime">2023-10-27T11:15:00.0000000Z</Data><Data Name="ProcessGuid">{1A2B3C4D-5E6F-7890-ABCD-EF1234567890}</Data><Data Name="ProcessId">5432</Data><Data Name="Image">C:\Windows\System32\setx.exe</Data><Data Name="FileVersion">10.0.19041.1 (WinBuild.160101.0800)</Data><Data Name="CommandLine">setx AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID "AKIAXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX" /M & setx AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" /M & setx AWS_DEFAULT_REGION "us-east-1" /M</Data><Data Name="CurrentDirectory">C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\</Data><Data Name="User">WIN-SRV01\Administrator</Data><Data Name="LogonGuid">{0A1B2C3D-4E5F-6789-0ABC-DEF123456789}</Data><Data Name="LogonId">0x12345678</Data><Data Name="TerminalSessionId">1</Data><Data Name="IntegrityLevel">High</Data><Data Name="Hashes">SHA1=HASH1,MD5=HASH2,SHA256=HASH3</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessGuid">{98765432-1FED-CBA0-9876-54321FEDCBA0}</Data><Data Name="ParentProcessId">1234</Data><Data Name="ParentImage">C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe</Data><Data Name="ParentCommandLine">"C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe" /c setx AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID "AKIAXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX" /M & setx AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" /M & setx AWS_DEFAULT_REGION "us-east-1" /M</Data><Data Name="ParentUser">WIN-SRV01\Administrator</Data></EventData></Event>

data.command_line: setx AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID "AKIAXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX" /M & setx AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" /M & setx AWS_DEFAULT_REGION "us-east-1" /M
